goal: Add 'Draft saved' UI indicator to draft-autosave.js and clear draft on send
sub_tasks: T1: Add small status indicator element near msgInput (opacity 0 by default)
T2: Show indicator briefly (1.5s) after successful save with a CSS transition
T3: Subscribe to HermesProxy.on('beforeSend', ...) to removeItem the draft for current session
T4: After clearing draft, hide indicator immediately
guard_focus: Does indicator show after save completes?
Does beforeSend correctly remove the draft for current session?
